---
title: "Resolution Dependence Processing"
format: html
---

```{r}
library(SpatialExperiment)
library(anndataR)
library(fs)
library(tidyverse)

raw_dir <- "../raw"
data_dir <- "../data"
```

First read in the raw merfish data as a CSV.

```{r}
raw <- read_csv(path(raw_dir, "merfish.csv"))
gene_start <- which(colnames(raw) == "Ace2")
cell_ids <- make.unique(as.character(raw$Cell_ID))
```

Build the colData and counts matrix.

```{r}
coldata_df <- raw |>
  select(1:(gene_start - 1)) |>
  as.data.frame()
rownames(coldata_df) <- (cell_ids)

counts_mat <- raw |>
  select(gene_start:ncol(raw)) |>
  data.matrix() |>
  t()
colnames(counts_mat) <- cell_ids
```

Combine into a SpatialExperiment.

```{r}
spatial_coords <- coldata_df[, c("Centroid_X", "Centroid_Y")] |>
  as.matrix() |>
  `storage.mode<-`("double")
colnames(spatial_coords) <- c("x", "y")

spe <- SpatialExperiment(
  assays = list(counts = counts_mat),
  colData = coldata_df,
  spatialCoords = spatial_coords
)
```

Save as RDS and h5ad.

```{r}
dir_create(data_dir)
saveRDS(spe, path(data_dir, "merfish.rds"))
write_h5ad(spe, path(data_dir, "merfish.h5ad"), mode = "w")
```
